column1: # Known broken links NOT present in the crawl export, fed to gen_redirects_map.py via --extra.
# These are the xmldocmd "namespace-summary see-cref doubling" bug: a namespace _index.md intro
# renders a bare `ns/class` cref that resolves one level too deep -> a doubled-namespace 404.
# The upstream fix belongs in the GroupDocs.<Product>-References sources (xmldocmd); these explicit
# 301s are the safety net until then. Columns: source <whitespace> target  (both /-rooted).
